info.title: Grow Payments — Light API (unofficial, merged)
info.description: Unofficial merged OpenAPI spec for the Grow Payments (Meshulam) Light API, assembled from https://grow-il.readme.io. Not affiliated with Grow/Meshulam. Identifiers (userId/pageCode) are per-business and issued by Grow support.

pageCode.description: Required field - Unique identifier refers to payment mathod

apiKey.description: Required only for companies that are working with multiple businesses. company's code

userId.description: Required field - Unique identifier refers to every business that is connected and uses Grow payments solutions.

pageCode.description: Required field - Unique identifier refers for this payment mathod

paymentLinkType.description: Required field -The link is closed for one payment

messageText.description:
Message text sent to user.


Required only in case the parameter "sendingMode" is send.

successUrl.description:
Optional  -An after payment "Thank you" URL. make sure to use HTTPS and not HTTP. Must use an external URL and not localhost. Example: https://mysite.co.il?success=true

Do not include special characters in this field.

customText[thankPageDescription].description: Optional -Description to the thank you page
customText[thankPageDescription].example: נציג יצור קשר בהקדם לקביעת מועד טיפול

invoiceNotifyUrl.description:
optional - Url for invoice

Do not include special characters in this field.

notifyUrl.description:
Optional - A fixed server address can be set via GROW

Do not include special characters in this field.

paymentTypes[0][payments][paymentsPaymen.description:
Required field  - in case the parameter 
paymentTypes[0][payments][paymentsMaxPaymentNum]
 is not sent.
 Determine payments number. 1-12

paymentTypes[0][payments][paymentsMaxPay.description:
Required field  in case the  parameter 
paymentTypes[0][payments][paymentsPaymentNum]
 is not sent.
-Determine payments number must be minimum 2
Restricting the number of payments. the customer can choose between 2- 12

pageFieldSettings[fullName][value].description: Required field -Full name must consist of at least two names.

pageFieldSettings[phone][value].description: Required field -A valid israeli mobile phone numebr Example: 0500000000

pageFieldSettings[invoiceName][isRequire.description:
Optional - specifies whether the customer is required to complete the invoice name field.
If set to true (or 1), the field becomes mandatory.
If set to false (or 0), the field remains optional.

pageFieldSettings[invoiceLicenseNumber][.description:
Optional - specifies whether the customer is required to complete the invoice name field.
If set to true (or 1), the field becomes mandatory.
If set to false (or 0), the field remains optional.

products[data][0][catalogNumber].description: Optional - catalog number of the product

products[data][0][vatType].description:
Required field- 
Specifies the value based on the business VAT status:


if the business is subject to regular VAT setting=  1
if the business is VAT-exempt - VAT setting = 3

transactionType[0].description: specify which payment method to display - Credit Card

transactionType[1].description: specify which payment method to display -bit

transactionType[2].description: specify which payment method to display -Apple Pay

transactionType[3].description: specify which payment method to display - Google Pay

transactionType[4].description: specify which payment method to display - bank transfer

transactionType[5].description: specify which payment method to display - Pay Box

cField1.description:
optional -Custom field, you may add up to 9 fields.

Do not include special characters in this field.

cField2.description:
optional -Custom field, you may add up to 9 fields.

Do not include special characters in this field.

backgroundColor.description:
Optional - Defines the background color of the payment page.

Format:
HEX color code (e.g. #FFFFFF)

buttonColor.description:
Optional - Defines the background color of the payment button.

Format:
HEX color code (e.g. #0285AC)

paymentButtonText.description:
Optional - Sets the text that will appear on the payment button

Validation rules:
Up to 20 characters - only letters

You can also configure a default business logo via the business management interface.

post.description: Each business has its own unique identifiers  (userId + pageCode) - the identifiers on this documentation are for example only. To integrate with the API, please contact Grow support to obtain the necessary permissions and your unique identifiers.

pageCode.description: Required field -Unique identifier refers to payment mathod

userId.description: Required field- Unique identifier refers to every business that is connected and uses Grow payments solutions.

backgroundColor.description:
Optional - Defines the background color of the payment page.

Format: HEX color code (e.g. #FFFFFF)

You can also configure a default business logo via the business management interface.

paymentButtonText.description:
Optional - Sets the text that will appear on the payment button

Validation rules: Up to 20 characters - only letters

You can also configure a default business logo via the business management interface.

buttonColor.description:
Optional - Defines the background color of the payment button.

Format: HEX color code (e.g. #0285AC)

You can also configure a default business logo via the business management interface.

businessLogo.description:
Required field – Defines the business logo displayed in the payment link.

Provide a valid image URL that will be used as the default logo for the business.

Validations:

Maximum file size: up to 512KB
Minimum resolution: 128x128 pixels
Supported formats: square, rectangle, or circular images

The configured logo will be automatically applied to all payment links created by the business.

isActive.description:
Required field -
Link is active = 1
inactive =0

transactionTypeId.description:
Required field - 
Credit card=1
Bit=6
Google Pay=14
Apple Pay=13

sum.description: Required field - Sum from server notification

firstPaymentSum.description: Required field - The first payment to pay in a multiple payments transaction

periodicalPaymentSum.description: Required field - The amount of each payment after the first payment in a multiple payments transaction

allPaymentsNum.description: Required field -Total number of payments to be made

asmachta.description: Required field -An approval from the credit card company for the payment

description.description: Required field- Description of the product to be charged (will appear in the details of the transaction as well) Example: Payment for a monthly subscription.

fullName.description: Required field -Full name must consist of at least two names.

payerPhone.description: Required field -A valid israeli mobile phone numebr Example: 0500000000

cardSuffix.description: Required field -Last 4 credit card digits from server notification

cardBrand.description: Required field -The card's brand from server notification

cardBrandCode.description:
Required field -
Mastercard=2
Visa=3
Isracard=5
Diners=8
Discover=7

cardExp.description: Required field -Card expiration date from server notification

post.summary: Further Payment -Premium Recurring By Token תיקון

userId.description: Required field - Will be provided by Meshulam for each clearing business Example: 41deb6f1347ee8b2.

apiKey.description: Required only for companies that are working with multiple businesses. company's code

sum.description: Required field - Total amount for payment Example: 10.99.

description.description: Required field - Description of the product to be charged (will appear in the details of the transaction as well) Example: Payment for a monthly subscription.

pageField[fullName].description: Required field - Full name must consist of at least two names.

pageField[phone].description: Required field - A valid israeli mobile phone numebr Example: 0500000000

cField1.description: Custom field, you may add up to 9 fields.

cField2.description: Custom field, you may add up to 9 fields.

companyCommission.description: A different commission than the regular commission Meshulam has. Example: 2.5.

recurringDebitId.description: Required field - the given value in the param "recurringDebitId" from the respons of the first premiume recurring payment  payment

transactionGroupIdentifier.description: optional - Group identifier for the payment- if you send a value in this field, then a check will be made if there is a succesful payment with this value,  then the request will be rejected .

transactionUniqueIdentifier.description: Required field - Unique identifier for the request - if we send a value in this field, then a check will be made that this is the first time we see this value for the business. If it finds that a request has been sent with this ID, then the current request will be rejected outright regardless of the status of the first request with this ID.
